title: Wrap errors with %w and inspect with errors.Is/As
description: Add context to errors using fmt.Errorf with %w so callers can unwrap and match sentinel or typed errors instead of comparing strings.
body: Use when returning or handling errors across package boundaries. Do not discard errors with _, compare error text with strings.Contains, or wrap with %v (which loses the chain). Actions: return fmt.Errorf("loading config: %w", err) to preserve the cause, define exported sentinel errors (var ErrNotFound = errors.New(...)) or typed errors, and match with errors.Is / errors.As at the boundary. Validation signals include errors.Is finding a wrapped sentinel in a test and `go vet` reporting no wrong %w usage. Risk boundary: swallowing an error to make a build pass hides real failures; deny that change and surface the error to the caller or log with the wrapped chain.
